summary: Tested all new multi-fabric features for returning customers. All 9 features working correctly: ProductConfigurePage multi-fabric support, StylingPage fabric codes display, WIPOrdersPage Copy button, and LinkMeasurementPage auto-population.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple WIP orders with multi-fabric configurations during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All multi-fabric features tested and working. Key data-testids: add-fabric-set-btn, remove-fabric-set-{index}, fabric-code-{index}, add-fabric-btn, delete-fabric-{index}, copy-order-{orderId}, add-to-wip-btn, proceed-to-styling-btn

1_product_configure_add_fabric_set.details: Add Fabric Set button (data-testid='add-fabric-set-btn') adds new fabric set with fabric/lining/button code inputs

2_product_configure_remove_fabric_set.details: Remove button (data-testid='remove-fabric-set-{index}') removes fabric set. Shows error toast when trying to remove last set.

3_product_configure_multi_fabric_codes.details: Each fabric set has fabric code (required), lining code (optional), button code (optional) inputs with camera/upload for images

4_styling_page_fabric_codes_display.details: StylingPage shows fabric codes in Fabric Details section with Set #1, Set #2 labels. Codes displayed in bold monospace font.

5_styling_page_add_fabric_navigation.details: Add Fabric button (data-testid='add-fabric-btn') navigates to ProductConfigurePage with existing configuration and returnMode=true

6_styling_page_delete_fabric.details: Delete button (data-testid='delete-fabric-{index}') removes individual fabric sets. Shows error when trying to delete last set.

7_wip_orders_copy_button.details: Copy button (data-testid='copy-order-{orderId}') navigates to StylingPage with pre-filled styling options, fabric configuration, and 'Returning Customer' badge

8_link_measurement_auto_populate.details: LinkMeasurementPage auto-populates measurements from customer profile. Product type correctly matches order product (e.g., 'Suits' matches '2 pc Suit')

9_full_flow_test.details: Full flow tested: Select customer -> Customize -> Select category -> Select product -> Configure multi-fabric -> Styling -> Save to WIP -> Copy order -> Verify pre-filled data

pricing_verification.two_fabrics: CMT: 370 (doubled), Total: 370 with 'Price includes 2 fabric sets' note

previous_bug_status.link_measurement_product_matching: FIXED - Product type now correctly matches 'Suits' to '2 pc Suit' using improved matching logic in LinkMeasurementPage.jsx lines 66-90
